name: UBA : Multiple Kerberos Authentication Failures from Same User
notes:
Detects 5 or more Kerberos authentication ticket failures from the same user within 24 hours.

Note: The username for Kerberos is Account Name there is no username in the payload, so use custom property “AccountName (custom)” to match. Before using this rule, make sure you have enabled "Search assets for username, when username is not available on event or flow data" in the UBA Settings page. Or install Log Source Extension to parse AccountName as Username.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures match at least 5 times with the same Account Name (custom) in 24 hour(s)
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters, BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures
when BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures match at least 5 times with the same Account Name (custom) in 24 hour(s)
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures match at least 5 times with the same Account Name (custom) in 24 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Multiple Kerberos Authentication Failures from Same User on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters, BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures
AND when BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures match at least 5 times with the same Account Name (custom) in 24 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Multiple Kerberos Authentication Failures from Same User
